sources.title: Max and Sadie | 2024 Comedy Drama Movie | Free Movie
sources.description:
Max and Sadie have been best friends since childhood. In the aftermath of the pandemic, they impulsively take a road trip for a college classmate's birthday party in an attempt to escape deeper problems they are each facing.

1949.  Stars: Vincent Price, Taylor Holmes, Patrick Whyte
